context.projectOverview: Sprint 2 establishes the on-disk authoring format for per-stack security knowledge + the total parser that reads it. Define SecuritySignature type, author skills/bober.security-generic/SKILL.md as discrete labelled signature blocks, implement a pure/total SecuritySignatureParser. No runtime audit behavior changes yet.

completedSprints.title: Widen taxonomy + structured metadata + hub collision fix
completedSprints.summary: VulnClass now 17 classes; FindingSeverity/FindingConfidence/TaintPath aliases + optional SecurityFinding fields (cwe/severity/confidence/taint/signatureId) added; inferVulnClass extended with dedicated xss branch. These types are available to import.
